reviews.text: Very Bad Services
Good service. A little slow at drive up.
The attorney was fantastic and willing to take time to answer my questions. I truly appreciate that!
Called and talked to a gentleman. He was very nice and very helpful 👍

Here is the firm that serves justice . I want extend my deepest gratitude and appreciation to Colin in particular . I came to Sisti law last year with a dated driving charge that potentially would have created serious issues in my life . That charge that took place over five years ago. In the interim I had moved out of state , created a healthy life and last year moved back to NH. I was notified by the DMV that I met the criteria for HO and I was completely in shock . I panicked, attended my first hearing with the state and quickly realized no prior notifications were sent thru clear and proper channels . I contacted Sisti law and was referred to Colin immediately. I explained the situation and he instantly took over , and confirmed my concerns . We attended several meetings with the DMV and maneuvered a court hearing to address the apparent and obvious issues. I am pleased to announce that I am completely in the clear as of now . Colin’s communication was outstanding . Colin has a calm demeanor about him and his approach is calculated and spot on . Not at one point did I believe my best interests were not at hand. For what is right and to the precise point of justice I feel vindicated , validated and relieved. I’ve learned several lessons here .

1- take nothing for granted
2- never come into court not represented
3- DMV is GOD
4- know your rights
5- hire SISTI

My life is moving continuously forward, hats off to all of you that believe in the law , justice is possible .

Respectfully submitted ;

Paul M.
Kind and compassioned law firm.
Mark L Sisti, Esq, A+ Attorney

I’ve called Mark Sisti when I needed someone to help me out with some legal matters and he was right there to assist me and helped me understand the entire process I was about to go thru and really helped me thru the entire process. Also Colin was really there for me every step of the way and after. Thank you for your services
Would recommend Mark Sisti 110% to represent them

Attorney Sisti really helped my son and me through an incredibly difficult situation and I will forever be grateful to the friend who recommended this office. I couldn't have asked for a more knowledgeable, straightforward or hardworking group to defend us.
Mark and his team very helpful

I am disappointed with my experience with Attorney Stephen Martin. He stated he would consider my case once it was approved by the commission. After I obtained approval and a Right to Sue, he became unresponsive and did not return my calls. His office took multiple messages and promised follow-up that never occurred. Relying on him ultimately proved disappointing, time-wasting, and careless, particularly given the time-sensitive nature of the matter.
Seth was than fair with me and I’ll never be able to fully express my gratitude for his work. He made me feel like a person and not just a client.

Attorney Hipple handled my case in a professional manner and went out of his way to contact me outside of normal business hours when necessary. He won my case and I honestly couldn't have asked for better representation in the matter. While I obviously never hope to "need" a lawyer, if future some circumstance arises, I will definitely seek his services again.

Seth Hipple is an A+ attorney — highly competent and I highly recommend him. Attorney Martin is also incredibly helpful and knowledgeable (both have helped me and/or my company through a few disputes). 10/10 do recommend. If you’re looking for peace of mind and assertive action on your behalf, this is the law firm for you.

Seth Hipple has been my attorney for over 7 years. I went through a high conflict divorce in 2014 and Attorney Hipple was an incredible advocate for me in the family court system. I continue to rely on him for his legal advice. He is always able to explain the process and tell me what I should expect. He’s very good at understanding the situation and finding appropriate and successful ways to help me resolve issues without going to court.  He has helped me navigate through years of conflict. He’s seen me through some of the most difficult times in my life and done so with compassion and kindness.

Seth Hipple represented my spouse in a very touchy legal matter.  My spouse had a mental melt down that resulted in serious criminal charges by the local police.  Seth was able to properly represent my husband without making him feel dishonorable.  He treated him with respect and skillfully directed him in conversations.  I cannot over state how much I appreciated his representation for us.  He is an honest, kind and caring attorney who has his integrity intact.

Attorney Martin handled my civil case with the utmost professionalism, compassion, and expertise. Stephen took the time to listen to my concerns and also to explain each step to me as we moved forward. The office staff is friendly and warm. This team genuinely cares about their clients and I wouldn't hesitate to recommend them to anyone.

We hired Steve Martin to handle our case and we could not have been happier with both the result (he won multiple judgements for us) and how he interacted with us (very responsive, courteous, knowledgeable, and a good person with high standards).  Keep up the good work Steve, and thank you!
Seth Hipple is more than proficient at what he does. Trust him to help you should you end up facing a judge or jury in New Hampshire. Top notch!
Effective and direct, Seth Hipple inspired confidence at every step.
Seth Hipple provided excellent legal support and was able to negotiate the best possible outcome
I highly recommend this law firm!
Very professional! I will recommend to all my friends!
I have been working with the lawyers at Martin and Hipple for a few years now and they have always been very professional and pleasant to deal with
Exceptionally professional and competent . Highly recommend!
Really stand up guys! I wouldn't go anywhere else for my legal needs.

Having had the opportunity to work with several members of the Burke and Eisner team over the years, I have consistently found them to be a hard working, competent, and dedicated group of professionals. Should you need legal services of the type they offer, I have no doubt you will find the support you need with this firm.
I've known Dave Austin for more than 20 years. He is an excellent attorney, very focused and attentive to detail.
Dave has been great to work with.
Very knowledgeable!

Dave has always been extremely professional.  He is available to answer my calls and emails regardless of the time of day, even on holidays.  I have no hesitation recommending him or using his services again should I ever need them.

I have had the pleasure of working with Dave Austin of Burke & Eisner over the past few years.  Dave is the consummate legal professional, yet easy to talk to and work with.  If I could add another star I would . . .
They were quick to respond back to me and were easy to talk to. I highly recommend them

Outstanding and extremely grateful!  I recently went through a contentious divorce and Heather Krans came highly recommended.  Not sure what is normal, but it seemed like my divorce was a never-ending stream of unexpected curveballs.  Heather and team were there to support me every step of the way. Frankly, could not be more satisfied.  Heather and team are easy to communicate with, very knowledgeable, tons of relevant experience, exceptionally responsive, and very understanding.   I would not wish the divorce process on anyone, but if you find yourself going through one, I don’t think you can find better representation that Heather Kranz and team.
reviews.ownerResponse: Thank you, Aaron!

reviews.text: I have had the privilege of working with Kathleen Davidson for over five years, and I can confidently say she is an exceptional attorney. Kathleen has navigated me through multiple complex cases across several states, always demonstrating her expertise, dedication, and professionalism. Her in-depth legal knowledge and keen strategic thinking have been invaluable assets throughout every case. I wish I didn’t need her as often as I have, but I’m incredibly grateful that she’s been there every step of the way. Beyond her legal acumen, Kathleen is compassionate, responsive, and truly cares about her clients. I couldn’t ask for a better advocate in my corner and would recommend her without hesitation to anyone seeking outstanding legal representation.
reviews.ownerResponse: Thank you Ben!

reviews.text: I am forever grateful for Kathleen Davidson and the representation I received during my divorce.  She was knowledgeable, professional, and her demeanor helped de-escalate an otherwise bonkers situation.  Highly recommend!

If you are looking for a lawyer who will listen to your divorce or alimony litigation problems, however complex and convoluted, and win the case for you, Kathleen Davidson is the lawyer for you. She patiently and meticulously dug up all the relevant materials from my 27-year old case files, studied them, asked me the critical questions, and collaborated with and leveraged experienced colleagues at her law firm. Then, miraculously she came up with the exact arguments that were needed to win. It is not enough to say that she is the BEST. Instead, I say that she is the BEST of the BEST. Simply put, you will very likely have a winning hand if she is on your side.
Heather Krans is the best. Has represented me 2x. She has my business even though it a long way to go.
Beth Deragon is a fantastic employment attorney!
Bob went above & beyond to help in a matter for me and i HIGHLY recommended his services
reviews.ownerResponse: Ryan, Thank you so much.  We enjoy working with you and are happy to be of service.

reviews.text: Experienced attorney. Very helpful. Easy to get to! I'd recommend.

Tanya and Brittney were great! They were very thorough and understanding of my needs and walked me through the whole process from beginning to end!
Highly recommended!

While the actual divorce was handled flawlessly by Tanya, the follow up with the QDRO pension split was not handled at all. It has to be signed by a judge so, I couldn't handle it on my own. I begged for two years for it to be handled and not only was it not, I was also ignored by multiple people at the firm. I got maybe three responses in those two years and no progress has been made.
It's completely absurd to throw a client to the wolves for no reason and childish to just ghost them.
Atty. Spony has taken care of a special needs trust for my nephew.  Thank you for your help in getting this done!

reviews.text: Matt and Sydney were super pleasant to work with! Very friendly,  helpful and efficient! THANK YOU!

Matt got me a settlement that was more than fair, with a case that other lawyers blew off. I'm in the Midwest but there's was no problem communicating with his office. The process took about a year, but he explained up front that it would and was clear about the steps. They were clear about what they needed me to provide and followed up when I was slow. When we got our first offer he suggested we could do better, at the second offer he said it was probably the best we could do, but both times the choice was mine. In short, I highly recommend him and would go to him again.
We are truly thankful to Matt and his team for his dedication and for ensuring the best possible outcome for my child.
What a Great guy he been my lawyer since 2017 wouldn’t trade him for anything he handles everything and very satisfied

Matt was very kind and thoughtful. He was always available to talk to when I had questions or concerns. He and his staff were very professional and thorough. They did a wonderful job handling my case. Highly recommend!

The day I walked into Matt's office for the first time for my personal injury appointment almost never happened. That day I had just received my accident report from state police and it stated that I was responsible for the tractor trailer driver's accident. I was in an accident on I91 and suffered cervical spinal cord damage. I was shocked to read that on the report because no ticket was issued. Matt was very easy to talk to while  explaining my side to him--his positive and reassuring attitude was calming. By the time my appointment ended, Matt was my counsel and not only did I have a chance--he ended up over time negotiating a settlement on our terms! I can't say enough about his experience and expertise! I 100% recommend Newborn Law for anyone needing legal counsel for personal injury!
Great! Gets back to you very promptly with any questions.
reviews.ownerResponse: Thank you.

reviews.text: I called and recived advice for a legal case and I can't begin to say just how helpful Newborn Law was. Thank you guys so much!
Excellent experience. Super great guy & attorney!
Matt, was awesome ty for what you had done for my daughter....I highly recommend him to anyone...
Attorney newborn is very responsive helpful excellent staff

Matthew Newborn is a very professional, caring and extremely knowledgeable attorney. He takes the time to listen and explain everything, so it is easily understood.  He is also very honest and really looks out for the best interest of his clients. I would highly recommend Newborn Law.
Amazing, professional and compassionate attorney. I would highly recommend Newborn Law to anyone in need.

Honesty, down to earth, and humble. You will have total peace of mind knowing he is on your side. Right from day one I knew I had made the right choice. Believe me when I say that he will earn your trust very early in the whole process. I could not be more pleased with the outcome. Five stars and then some!

We were very happy with the way in which Matt Newborn handled our case. He prepared us for the process and was ever-present to answer questions and provide updates. Our case was not cookie-cutter and without him, we would not have been able to recover the expenses we'd lost due to accident. We would highly recommend him.

Matt Newborn is knowledgeable, professional, and patient. He took all the time I needed to explain my case and the steps we would have to go through. He and his staff are extremely responsive to calls or emails from clients and insurance companies. He tells it like it is and doesn't build up false expectations. I felt like he was very competent and thorough in keeping track of all the paperwork and details involved in my case. He is a pleasure to talk to as well!

Might as well be 10 stars in my book!

This dynamic duo is knowledgeable, patient, compassionate and tirelessly working for their clients. I was 13 yrs old when my mother was hit by an uninsured driver. I unfortunately had to under go operations and procedures due to this negligence, which resulted in a torn rotator cuff repair. At the end of my litigation, my attorney passed, which unfortunately left me in what felt like a huge legal limbo of settlements and drowning in court documentation at the ripe age of 17. During the final hours of that injury case, I received harassing call after call in regards to that litigation and after the death of my attorney, I felt panicked, I didnt know where to turn... I picked up the phone, called Newborn  Law and got the kind welcoming voice of Mr. Newborn. Matt lent some sound advice with a simple consult... YEARS later that act of kindness brought me back! As unfortunate as it was to be in another injury case, I am thankful that this team's diligence made it as easy and stress free as it could be. His one act of kindness is what sold me on this team for a lifetime. Matt is a straight shooter, realistic and hard working. Kim is kind, patient and compassionate, I'm grateful to call myself a client of such capable and wonderful people. Words DO NOT EXPRESS the respect I have for these people, GIVE THEM A CALL! You wont be sorry you did!
Answer questions over the phone
Ive had such a positive amazing experience dealing with BJ about my car accident situation. He will absolutely help you out when you need him!

I cannot over express the gratitude I feel for this firm. From the very first phone call, my situation was handled with care, attention, and seriousness. I always felt like someone had my back and was listening to understand me. I will look here first if I ever have the need again.

Atty. BJ Branch and his associates have worked with our agency for many years.  They are responsive and tireless advocates for justice and the public good.  BJ is a pleasure to work with when sorting through details, facts and issues.  He is personable, professional, knowledgeable and brings a lighthearted and honest approach to difficult situations.  He has represented and advised us on many challenging and multi-faceted legal questions.  Don't think twice about contacting him/them!

Mr. Wolkowski has an immense amount of knowledge in legal matters. He handled my case with both patience and a professionalism that can only be attained through experience. When seeking his assistance in a case, the one thing I learned is to listen and allow him to handle the legalities; in short, let him do what he does best. Some cases may take a long time, but don’t fret; he has your best interest in mind. I am forever grateful he agreed to represent me in my extremely convoluted case. Thank you so much, Mr. Wolkowski
Super unhelpful

Contacted attorney Megan Douglas in June, 2024 and was told we have a whistleblower case for wrongful termination. She stated she needed 1 month and she would get to work for us. At the time, we sent her all the information she requested. After endless text messages and voice mails, she set an appointment for October 25, 2024, about 4 months after the original contact. At the meeting she said our case could take up to two years and lots of money. If she told us this 4 months earlier, we would have gone elsewhere. We collected our file. She is the reason lawyers have such a bad reputation.

Professional, Knowledgeable, and Unwaveringly Dedicated Attorney

I had the pleasure of working with Megan Douglass, and I couldn’t be more impressed with her level of expertise and dedication. From the start, Megan made sure to explain everything in detail, guiding me through each step of the legal process with patience and clarity. She was always responsive, addressing my concerns quickly and making me feel fully supported throughout.

What really stood out to me was her unwavering dedication. Megan often went above and beyond, working nights and weekends to ensure everything was handled efficiently and with the utmost care. Her commitment to her clients is truly remarkable, and it was clear she genuinely cared about achieving the best possible outcome.

Above all Megan is a terrific person. She cares deeply about NH and it's marginalized communities and that shows in her work expanding protections for employees and many others in NH.

In conclusion her professionalism, combined with her deep knowledge of the law, gave me great confidence in her ability to handle my case effectively. I highly recommend Megan to anyone seeking a reliable and skilled attorney who consistently puts her clients’ needs first.

In a world full of greed, Attorney Meyer stands out as an honest and genuine lawyer working for the people. I have been treated with more dignity and respect by him than by any other professional I have come across, without asking for anything in return. He is the only type of person I can find myself trusting.
Effective an Fast Service !!!

Bj branch and his staff, they are absolutely 💯 percent awesome and they will fight tooth and nail for you,,I  guarantee 💯 percent satisfaction,,
Thank you bj for all you've done for me,,,
Very knowledgeable and patient. The most respectful attorney I’ve spoken to and who didn’t act in a condescending manner.

Spoke with attorney and every point that I brought up was shut down. He says the longer you wait the more damages you can claim. So I have to get kicked out of my apartment, lose my car to show more damage to make it fiscally cost effective. He didn’t even listen to my whole story. Unless you’ve got a slam dunk case. I would definitely call someone else.
Highly recommended. Affordable, knowledgeable, and caring

I don't think I'll ever be able to put in words how incredible and amazing person Jason is!
Cases that a lawyer can really believe in seem rare, and when Jason got one he genuinely appreciated it by helping me restore faith in humanity. A thorough professional Jason makes everything seem so easy and is an attorney you can count on blindly. My family will ever be greatful to his help in my situation.

Not happy with my case.
Branch did not did well with my case. Disappointment

Kempton is a first-class attorney.  He is extremely knowledgeable in every aspect of the law he represents as well as highly respected in the industry by his peers.  He was great in representing me in a divorce case.  He was efficient, always kind and prompt and was able to move the other party forward when they were stalling.  He always treated everyone with respect and kindness, whether client or opponent.  He has a compassionate nature and great sense of humor which can certainly lighten most difficult moments.  He is also reasonable in his fees.  I highly recommend him.  In addition, Jennifer Martin was extremely competent and efficient in dealing with the real estate portion of this.  I thank them very much.
Donnamarie
This guy is the real deal! Solution oriented and no BS approach. Super dedicated and prompt with everything on a complicated case. Highly recommend!

Horrible.  ZERO communication,  follow ups, nothing... even after multiple calls and emails.  Acts bothered.  He shouldn't take cases he's not able to handle or be willing to advocate for his clients.  Wants to sit back and do nothing.  WOMEN, STAY AWAY!!!
Amazing lawyer the best out there in the area

Kempton is one of those rare attorney's who  "gets it done!"  He is more than capable, efficient, and able to bring parties together despite circumstances being difficult.  He is highly respected amongst others in the legal profession and has nice ways.  I turn to Kempton after hiring another attorney who charged excessively and dragged things out.  Changing horses mid-stream was not easy, but I'm glad I did.

Attorney Giggey is well respected throughout both the Massachusetts and New Hampshire Courts. For the past several years he has successfully conciliated dozens of cases for me.  I know my contemporaries similarly respect and enjoy his assistance. As great of an attorney as he is, he is a better person.
I really enjoyed working with this attorney. Has a lot of years of experience in practicing law. Knows the judges, the law and knows how to get things done efficiently! Thanks Stu

I feel compelled to warn all women. Gingery Kempton is bias against women. He presents “women are all greedy” you can’t negotiate fairly under such biases. I came into my marriage with more assets and money then my soon to be ex. Because I was a stay at home mother of twins for 6 years he wants to tell me “I am greedy” to ask for half of our assets. Beware before conciliation what you are entering into……….I am disgusted by what men think they are entitled. Do whatever they want and get everything too!
Kempton was fantastic and personable. Very knowledgeable lawyer and very respectful. I highly recommend using his office for all of your needs. And of course the bonus of fair pricing as well.
Very professional courteous Detailed to my every needs got the job done  Efficiently

Kempton is an excellent lawyer. He is a phenomenal negotiator and was able to bring our case to conclusion acting as our conciliator appointed by the court. He is professional, to the point and communicates clearly and concisely. Kempton was a pleasure to work with and I would highly recommend him
Great group of people to work with very professional

I would never use Kempton again. I used him a few years ago for a divorce and I am worse off now. So many mistakes in my agreement that should never had gone by a lawyer. I do not even think he looked at my agreement. Now, because of laws, I can not even fix things. I would not recommend him at all.

Attorney Brenner Webb is a very professional, knowledgeable and he deeply cares about his clients. He went above and beyond while working on my case. He is very easy to get in touch with and kept me informed about my case. I highly recommend his services.

Thank you!

reviews.text: Worked with Barbara to negotiate a commercial lease. Professional, extremely thorough, polite, friendly, and prompt. Wonderful experience and I can't recommend highly enough! THANK YOU!
Chip is the best of the bests, so sad that he is retiring.

Well, I have to give a lot of credit to attorney Charles L Powell, PLLC. even though my head was not on straight because of a concussion, what I was going through he took the time to show me what is available, and what is not available in the Workmen’s Compensation program. He literally wrote the book on it. He helped us to find a direction to go get all the hospital visits. Doctors visits in line so that I could get well and move forward with the injuries that I sustained. He was able to have Justin Saluca attorney-at-law work with me to the very end.

Don’t take Workmen’s Compensation injuries for granted get the help of an attorney and you’ll never be sorry especially if you use these two attorneys.

Words can not describe the gratitude, appreciation & thank you to this law office specifically Charles  and Justin who went above and beyond on my case. If you are reading this post and are looking for representation in any type of Workmen's Compensation case  please let me say that #1 Workplace injuries can and do happen. Many times bringing life changing issues that can be physically and mentally challenging not to mention affecting your ability to provide financially for you and your family. In a time like this you may find yourself at a loss of how to proceed and move on and regain your independence and ability to be self- sufficient. Possibly due to no fault of your own. Many people define their identity and self worth through their ability to excell at their job or trade whether they realize it or not. All of a sudden this ability is taken away, sometimes permanently, sometime not. This happened to me and life as you know it is forever changed. I was blessed to be referred to the Law offices of Attorney Charles Powell.  Attorney"Chip" conferred with me in confidence and immediately started the arduous work of the filing and forms(Of which there are many) to protect my financial well-being and self worth through the process preventing me from the pitfalls and mistakes I'm sure I would have  encountered. If you find you need a trusted ally and guide to represent you and your loss (or threat of loss) Do not hesitate to call Chip. He is a man of honor and will bring you the best possible results. Sincerely Mark Laughlin..

Charles (Chip) was excellent.  From the first phone call to the last, he was always responsive and attune to what was happening in my case; from beginning to the end. Always returned messages or calls in a timely manner whether it be in the evening or on the weekend and he was very empathetic when I was, at times, very frustrated.  I wouldn't hesitate to call Chip again if I ever needed help in VT.  Highly recommended!!!!!    Thanks CHIP!!!!

We highly recommend Charles (Chip) Powell to anyone who is looking for a Workers Compensation Attorney to represent them. Thanks to Chips hard work and determination we were able to reach a settlement with Workers Comp and we no longer have to deal with them, EVER! Contacting Chip Powell was the best thing we ever did! He is so kind and he really cares about the people he represents! To anyone reading this that is looking for a honest, kind and compassionate Attorney, Please give Chip Powell a call! If you are looking for a lawyer to represent you in a workman's comp case, you've found the perfect person in Charles (Chip) Powell. He is honest, sincere & tenacious . It's a nerve-wracking experience and you want somebody who will always be by your side and knows the law inside and out. It never seems fair when you're left with a permanent injury, but he helps both by educating you, by emotionally supporting/encouraging you and lastly, by financially through his fierce negotiations. You can't go wrong by hiring him.
So happy with chip and justin, i got back way more than i expected! They were very responsive also, no question unanswered! They were awesome!

I highly recommend Attorney Charles “Chip” Powell based on his expertise in handling workers’ compensation cases. To Chip, I wasn’t just a case; he really took the time to understand how my injury changed my life, all aspects of it.
It was such a stress relief to have representation throughout the entire process. Chip has an established practice and as such he has many resources lined up to help throughout the process. He arranged to have additional medical exams and specialists visits for documentation that were unbiased. He fought to get the treatment and medications that I needed, which workers’ compensation had stop paying for.
Throughout the process Chip always sent me updates or called to let me know how things were progressing. If I didn’t understand he always took the time to answer my question in a way that I would comprehend it (minus the legal speak). I couldn’t have done this without hiring Chip; if you have a work related injury I would call him as soon as possible.

I was injured at work that resulted in surgery.
I filled out all the paperwork and sent in to the insurance company thinking I wound be fine and covered throughout the uncertain time of recovery. When I got out of surgery it was a rude awakening to find out I was denied for no apparent reason and that my employer was contesting my claim as well.
I hired Attorney Justin Slukka at that point and he quickly took action.
I was frantic and a nervous wreck for I was disabled and could not work while receiving no benefits. I did not know how I would survive.
Mr. Slukka assured me not to worry and that he was confident in my case.
He answered all my questions and concerns promptly throughout this process.
He did such a good job the State issued an interim order reversing the denial.
He has lots of experience dealing with the insurance companies and the State.
Very knowledgeable on workers comp laws.
Justin Slukka exceeded all my expectations and the outcome of my case was better than expected. All of which did not need to go to a formal hearing.
I give Mr. Slukka 5 stars and would recommend him to anyone who is injured on the job. It is a brutal process and you definitely need the right representation.
In many ways Justin Slukka saved my life and I will forever be grateful.
Justin has been very timely,accurate and very helpful I fought for 3 years no one could help me win my case I found Justin and 4 years later he won my case for me !!!! He is the Heavy Hitter

Even though they could not help me only due to jurisdictional reasons, they took the time to talk to me and pointed me to someone that could help.

I read where some didnt like her.  She will tell you up front if she cant help you.  She is very honest and caring.  A great woman doing what she can with what you give her.  If your honest she will work hard for you.  If your not honest dont waste your time.  The only disability lawyer I had found in new Hampshire that does the work where the other lawyer have you fill out paperwork and tell you there is nothing more they could do. Great job done

Dan is highly skilled, attentive, honest, and one of the best at his craft. I wouldn't want anybody else to represent me. I would also like to add that Dan was appointed to me by the court and I believe that he still put in the same amount of effort and work as he would have had I paid him out of pocket.  If you research Dan's qualifications you can even find articles talking about how paid attorneys become court appointed attorneys for some cases in NH and how he does this because he doesn't believe anyone should sit in jail going without representation. Dan is truly one of the good guys and not only does he have a good working relationship with district attorneys, police officers, detectives, the courts, clerks, and judges locally but he has the knowledge and experience to help you through any legal matter.

Told me I would be released on one date and told courts and jail another. Even called the week before and talked to him. Told me the release date he said before was correct. When I asked for an updated release they told me Nothing had changed and they had spoken with my lawyer. Dodged my calls after for the rest of the week. Thought he did a good job at first. Until he left me sitting in jail with a false hope promise. Guys a snake
Very professional and cares about the welfare of a persons understanding and clarity as to what is actually going on with your case
Amazing service! No complaints whatsoever with the outstanding service I received from this office. Would use this office again if the time called for it 10/10!!

My experience, having Dan Dockett for a lawyer, was not as pleasant as the positive experiences that I see here in his list of reviews.
Unfortunately, though I could've went to my parents for help to pay for a lawyer to represent me in my case, I took a chance with using a court appointed attorney. I had the misfortune of receiving Dan Dockett. I guess it was his turn to put in his time to do pro bono work.
Anyone would figure that a person would receive the same amount respect from a lawyer that is representing you, as he would give anyone else that were paying him top dollar to represent them. Right?You would also think that he would work as hard for you as he would for someone who paying him? I mean, shouldn't a true decent human being give their all to fight for a person, especially when given the proper evidence that proves you to be the victim and not the problem?
In my case, that didn't happen. The only thing Mr Dockett did for me, was make a plea deal that was çompletely absurd. He didn't even care to take my case to trial. His demeanor showed great levels of apathy as opposed to the empathy that a person, in my position, deserves.
Dan Dockett is a good lawyer when presented with the right amount money to fill his pockets. I feel for anyone who has him as a court appointed attorney. They will only receive substandard treatment along with substandard efforts from him. That shows how much of a substandard person he really is.

One of the greatest human beings I’ve ever had the privilege of meeting. Mr. Duckett helped myself and my family get through two very difficult times and we will NEVER forget it! Honest, honorable, and caring are words that don’t begin to describe the man.
Very professional and dedicated. Knowledgeable and shows amazing gumption.

Although I hope to avoid situations that require legal representation, I would call Dan everytime hands down if I needed to. Knowledgable and through when obtaining information regarding my particular case. With his guidance, I was able to navigate through a difficult legal situation, and come out on the other side feeling blessed. Thanks Dan!!
Excellent!

reviews.text:
Initially I thought she was amazing until we figured out it was all a money grab , my brother was barred from the U.S. and the only way that he could visit was a waiver . We met with her and she was very nice and essentially lied about what could be done to fix his status we were overjoyed and my brother paid $1300 for her services. When he attended his interview at the U.S. Embassy they asked him why he was there and he said because my lawyer advised him. They told him if you know the law you would know that if you get barred the only way to re enter is a waiver sorry. I contacted my original lawyer and this is what he said.

Serge,

Good to hear from you.  Sorry to hear about the problems with your younger brother.
To enter the US a Canadian needs to meet the standards for admission.
Unfortunately 20 years ago you brother got caught in a lie or some form of misrepresentation.
Border Control had the authority to turn him around and send him back to Canada, which they did, writing him up, and subjecting him to 5 year bar from entering the US for 5 years.

Even after the 5 years you brother still has the record of having lied or misrepresented some fact at the border, which makes him inadmissible, unless he can secure a waiver.
Regrettably the immigration law doesn't forgive misrepresentation in the absence of a waiver, and a waiver is tough to get.
Waivers are expensive, and in the case of a waiver for a simple visit, expire at the end of the visit.

A more permanent waiver could be obtained if your brother sought one in connection with obtaining a green card.
It sounds to me like it makes a lot more sense for you and your family to visit your brother in Canada, rather than have him visit you in the US.

If you want to try to overcome this bar on his re-entry I would suggest that he pursue a green card through a US relative, a wife, a child, a parent?
As part of that process the waiver could be processed, assuming that there is a qualifying relative to support the waiver request - and that relative must show extreme hardship if he is not allowed to remain here in the US.
Assuming he gets that waiver, and his green card is approved, then all is forgiven, and the bar will not impact him when he comes and goes from the US presenting his green card.
However, as a green card holder he needs to spend significant time here in the US, and needs to make the US his home.

Otherwise, he's going to continue to have this problem as an "immigration violator" who committed fraud or misrepresentation, and has no way to achieve forgiveness.

So as you can see it was clearly a money grab stay far away from this lawyer !!!!!!!
reviews.ownerResponse: Let's correct the record, you were charged $1,000.00 for a visitor visa which is the going rate, any additional fee was based on a Consulate charge.  Misrepresentation was not disclosed at client intake.  He did not qualify for an immediate visa.  I understand you are frustrated, but Department of State, USCIS & DHS take misrepresentation seriously.  If you think $1,000.00 makes me rich and that I was all about money, then you are sadly mistaken.  Unfortunately, he will not qualify for a waiver, unless there's a Material change in his circumstances.  We wish you well.

I had the pleasure of working with Liv at (The Sakellarios Legal Team) on a challenging legal matter, and the experience exceeded every expectation I had.
From the very first consultation, their professionalism was immediately apparent—courteous, respectful, and always maintaining the highest standards of conduct. They treated my case with the seriousness and attention it deserved, making me feel valued as a client every step of the way.
What stood out most was their thoroughness. They dove deep into every detail, leaving no stone unturned in reviewing evidence, researching precedents, and building a strong, well-documented strategy. Their preparation was meticulous, which gave me complete confidence that my interests were fully protected.
Communication was direct, clear, and timely throughout the entire process. They kept me informed at every stage, explaining complex legal concepts in straightforward terms without jargon, so I always understood what was happening and why. This transparency helped ease the stress of the situation and made me feel truly supported and present in my own case—I was never left wondering or in the dark.
They presented all available options honestly and objectively, weighing the pros and cons of each path forward, which allowed me to make informed decisions with their expert guidance. Ultimately, they successfully won the case in my favor, delivering the outcome I hoped for and more.
I’ve since referred several friends and colleagues to them, and every one has reported the same outstanding experience. Their dedication, skill, and client-focused approach make them the team you want on your side.
I give them my highest recommendation—five stars without hesitation. If you’re seeking reliable, effective legal representation, look no further. They are truly exceptional.

reviews.text:
If there was an option to give zero stars, I would. My experience with Cronin Bisson & Zalinsky was an absolute nightmare. From the beginning, communication was a major issue; responses were sluggish and lacked clarity, making an already stressful situation unbearable. When it came to handling the escrow funds for our condo transaction, John Bisson showed a disturbing lack of professionalism and transparency.

Several times, the funds were not disbursed on time, with no explanation provided. It was always one excuse after another, leading to severe delays that cost us additional money. The lack of accountability was astounding. Even more troubling were discrepancies in the escrow statement that were never satisfactorily explained, despite repeated inquiries.

Dealing with Cronin Bisson & Zalinsky not only added layers of unnecessary stress to our property transaction but also led us to question the integrity of the whole process. I strongly advise anyone considering this attorney to look elsewhere. Trust and reliability are key in legal matters, and unfortunately, both are qualities that Cronin Bisson & Zalinsky profoundly lacks.

John Bisson is a recognized top tier condo lawyer for many New Hampshire condominium/HOA communities.  As a property management team, many of our clients rely on John's expertise and guidance.  While an expert in matters of condo law, his ability to apply law with practical advisement necessary for the condominium community is an exceptional resource.

CBZ’s conducting of seminars periodically is a big aid to condo boards and property managers.  John Bisson’s presentations always contain pertinent and topical information for board’s to gain an understanding and act on.  The free sessions provide an opportunity to ask question and to get John’s insight.
They offered a great topic for Board Members regarding Insurance.  It was very interesting and helpful to insights regarding an important subject.

I had a great experience working with Cronin, Bisson & Zalinsky. I've worked with a number of law firms over the years for business, real estate, and personal matters, and more than any firm I’ve worked with, I got the sense that this group actually cares. That might seem like a small thing, but I’ve worked with enough firms over the years that it’s become an increasingly important factor when I’m choosing an attorney. When I’m working with an attorney, I’m looking for knowledge, experience, and hopefully reasonable rates – but what I’m really looking for is a sense that the attorney I’m working with is on my team. From the very first conversation I got the sense that they were genuinely looking out for me, not just evaluating whether my issue was worth their time. Highly recommended.

This law firm doesn't like to return phone calls to their clients.  I've called 4 times to try to set up an appointment over two weeks and no response. We initially worked with Joe to set up my father's revocable trust, during which he repeatedly attempted to upsell us on additional services. When we later activated the power of attorney and sought to establish an irrevocable trust for my father’s long-term care, Joe’s attitude shifted dramatically. Instead of guiding us through this sensitive process with professionalism and care, he was suspicious, dismissive, and uncooperative. His lack of engagement and support caused unnecessary stress during an already difficult time. A good estate planner should act as a trusted advisor—Joe did not. If you're looking for someone who takes a holistic and client-focused approach to estate planning, I strongly recommend finding a more compassionate and service-oriented professional.
reviews.ownerResponse: First, this reviewer has never been a client, so this is not an actual review of our services. Second, I Represented his dad Robert (not his real name).  I had recommended robert use a trust for his estate planning.  Robert insisted he wanted a will, so to accommodate him, I did draft a will.  The reference to the upselling was because I recommended a trust to avoid probate which the will would need to go through.  So even though tries to portray the trust as an upset, the reviewer admits that he was coming back to me for a trust which is what I recommended in the first place.  Since this reviewer has never been a client, I wanted to check Robert's power of attorney to determine that this reviewer had authority to create a trust for Robert. It only took a moment to determine that as I pulled it up online.  Also the power of attorney required 2 doctor notes to state Robert was mentally incompetent to activate the power of attorney.  I asked the reviewer if he had the doctor notes and that I needed a copy for my file so show that the reviewer had authority to create the trust.  It was at this point that the reviewer seemed to think that I was offending him by asking for the 2 doctors notes.  My ongoing duty was to Robert to make sure his wishes were carried out.  I was doing just that.  If you are going to write a review, make sure you know what you are talking about and actually be accurate and honest in the review.  This review is not in the least bit accurate or honest and he was actually coming back to have a trust drafted that I had recommended in the first place.
Thank you Julia for the nice rating!

This is a fake review. This is a Cancel Culture type review. I asked to get paid for the hours of work I put in and so since this client doesn't want to pay she wrote a fake review in an effort to hurt me. The truth is that the divorce case was completed over with 7 months ago from the time of this persons writing. We talked about what a Judge might do at trial. I was prepared to go to trial. She chose not to go to trial. She wanted to reach an agreement and get on with her life. I was not agreeing with opposing counsel. I was prepared to go to trial. I wouldnt have let her sign the agreement if it was not fair and if she didnt want to sign it. The Judge wouldnt have approved the agreement if it wasnt a fair agreement.

She didnt have a problem with me at all during the divorce or the 7 months after the divorce. She was past due on her payments to me. In response to owner: Violating attorney client privileges further shows how unprofessional and unethical you are. Furthermore Joe can you get any more lazy? You copied and pasted the email you sent me when I asked for a refund for the terrible service I received from you. Lastly you did not inform me of the penalties in MASS because you DID NOT know. Thus it was not included in the summary of events you sent me following the trial. Your actions and statements prove you are the embodiment of what a SHADY CHEAP LAW FIRM IS. Take responsibility for the lies you told me and terrible job you did as my lawyer. How you even are able to practice law is a disgrace.
reviews.ownerResponse:
This client was charged with a DWI when driving home from Hampton Beach. I was prepared to go to trial. However, right before trial she told me that what she had told the police at the scene and was written in the police report was not true. She had lied to the officer at the scene and to me. Then she told me the real story (minutes before the trial was to start) and what had happened and that she was drinking in the Hampton bars for several hours before driving home. She told me that she would take the stand and lie to the Judge as well and tell the story in the police report which was not true.

I told her that if we were to go to trial and if she were going to take the stand, then she would need to tell the truth. The truth being that, if asked, she was there all day and that she had been drinking.
I am an officer of the court which I take seriously. I cannot allow a client to lie to the Judge on the stand.
If she were to lie on the stand, I would either be forced to withdraw mid trial which would be a signal to the Judge that she was lying.
This action would have been devastating to her case. Plus she could have been charged with perjury.

It was at that point she seriously thought about taking a plea.
I was able to negotiate a plea to Negligent Operation which included a fine and no license suspension in NH. Also, that if the information was to be transmitted to MA, then they could impose their own penalties.
She wanted to take a chance that the information was not going to be exchanged with MA and complete the plea rather than have a trial.

I did not talk her into anything, I did not lie to her, I kept her informed all along.

The real story is that she lied to the police and initially lied to me. She told me she was going to lie to the Judge. And now she is lying on Google and to the public.

I did my job and did it well. In fact, when she signed the Acknowledgement and Waiver of Rights form, she stated that she was satisfied with me and all of my explanations have been clear.
I answered all her questions.

This plea was not for my advantage. It was solely for her advantage to prevent her from hurting her case by lying on the stand.

Her actions and statements have consequences.
She needs to take responsibility for her actions.
Thank you

reviews.text:
We recently completed the execution of our trust documents with the Seven Rivers Law office, and the entire experience was exceptional from start to finish. The staff demonstrated an impressive level of patience and professionalism, taking the time to guide us through each document in clear, understandable terms.

They ensured we fully understood every provision before signing and never once made us feel rushed. Any questions we had—no matter how small—were welcomed and answered thoroughly and with kindness. Their attention to detail and commitment to making the process comfortable and transparent truly set them apart.

We left feeling confident in our decisions and grateful for the team’s support. We would highly recommend the Seven Rivers Law office to anyone seeking knowledgeable and courteous assistance with trust documentation.

A year later we returned to sign and once again Kimberly and her staff were professional, friendly and knowledgable about the subject matter.  All of my questions were answered, the signing went smoothly and I’m happy to have that task crossed of my to-do list.

Also, their new office building is very nice and the Office Administrator made me some coffee.

reviews.text: Our Estate planning was done with 7 Rivers. She could have answered questions regarding her findings but refused. I recommend contacting a caring attorney that will not dump you because of greed.

reviews.text: Kristin and Kim were lifesavers after being hit by an uninsured drunk driver. Their support, kindness and strength allowed me to focus soley on healing. We highly recommend the law firm of Rousseau & Ross. Following a devastating car accident, hospitalization and rehabilitation, we were thankful they were able to take our case that spanned four different states. The fullest possible recovery of health and financial loss was dependent on the essential, dedicated, and thoughtful work of this law office. Kristen, Kira and Summer put their heart into this, which gave us the hope that we would one day have our life back. They helped to lift our perspective to a view that could be seen from a higher vantage point, above the multiple challenges that we were facing through the recovery process. We raised our shield of faith and held on with patient endurance as we were healing and anticipating a satisfactory resolution. Their genuine kindness and amazing work helped to put us back on our feet and gave us hope. Beyond the fine medical care that we received, Kristen and her dedicated team responded mightily to our need, resulting in a successful outcome.

C. & T. B

I can’t thank my lawyer, Kristin, and her amazing assistant, Kim, enough for everything they did for me after my car accident. They always listened to me and gave me advice through the process, but ultimately they were letting me make the final decisions. I am so glad I chose Rousseau & Ross to help me with my case and I recommend them to anybody looking for an injury lawyer. Mike is the best, look no further. 19 months ago I swerved to avoid a deer at night. I missed the deer but I hit a rock on the right side of my vehicle which did damage to the right front suspension. That night would change my life forever because I was charged with OUI, having a loaded firearm in my possession, which I was licensed to carry and two other charges. I have never been is this situation, but I knew I needed an attorney and a good one so the search was on. After calling several of the best rated OUI attorneys I was discouraged until I spoke to Mike. When I first met with Mike, it was a free one hour consultation where he explained the whole process to litigate these charges and defend me. At this point, he had limited information so there was no sugar coating the severity of this case (the good, bad and ugly). Mike is an optimist and a realist at the same time, he puts you at ease and explains everything right up front. I felt he was the most honest attorney with a winning and positive attitude that would give me the best defense because he truly is an expert on OUI cases. There was a number of setbacks beyond his control which is inherent in the court system, but he kept me informed and we met when it was necessary. Throughout the process he tells you this is your case, and you are ultimately in charge of what course-of-action we take, based on his guidance and experience. I was found “Not Guilty” by a jury trial. In the end, all I can say is this, if you need an OUI attorney in Massachusetts call Mike Bowser, because he is the best and priced the fairest by far.
Would highly recommend to a friend.

reviews.text: Extremely impressed with this law firm! Neil and Brittany got me a great settlement from an auto accident, and went above and beyond to make sure that I received every dollar possible. During the whole process they kept me well informed, and I felt fully taken care of. My case turned out to have a lot of complexity and surprises, but they handled everything with ease. If you’re considering them, I can confidently say that you’ll be in very good hands. Highly recommended!

I highly recommend Nicholson Law Firm for personal injury cases.  After my husband was hit by a pickup truck that ran a stop sign and the extent of his injuries was becoming clear, we knew we would need help.  We didn’t want to go with the national chains that take up all the airways, so we started looking at lawyers locally.  One of the lawyers we contacted referred us to Nicholson Law.  Neil Nicholson contacted us right away.  He came to our house to talk through the accident, confirm we had a case, and walk us through the process.  We met with Neil and his associate Brittany LeTourneau on several occasions.  Early on they encouraged us to take pictures of the injuries, document the impacts on our lives, and write our impact statements.  Once medical treatments were complete, they kept us updated as they worked with the insurance company, and informed us of settlement offers.  Ultimately we met with a mediator where we were finally offered fair compensation for the injuries.  Neil and Brittany were always responsive to us.  This was the only time we’ve ever had to deal with a personal injury lawyer, and I can’t imagine how anyone could do better.  Their level of expertise and their compassion was top notch.
reviews.ownerResponse: Thank you for the positive review Robin! We are delighted to hear that you had such a great experience. We’re especially pleased that you enjoyed working with Attorney Nicholson and Attorney LeTourneau. We strive to provide excellent customer service and effective communication, so we’re glad that we were able to exceed your expectations.

I am not the person to leave bad reviews on something that is someone’s livelihood but this one is a bit personal for me I gave him the money he asked for and  almost a whole 3 months later not quite I get arrested for having a warrant and held in county jail when I went before the judge on a video arraignment there was no record of me being represented by James Moir esq anywhere I told the judge he was my lawyer and there must be some misunderstanding because it should have been cleared months ago and should have a new court date the judge obviously did not believe me and raised my bail from 1,000$ cash bail to 3,000$ cash bail and since my dwi subsequent case was out of Hillsboro county I got transferred to one of the worst jails in the country valley street where after 2 weeks of my family fiancé and I trying to get a hold of him I paid the bail bondsman the 3,000$ cash and received a new court date so at this point I have spent almost $8,000 and he hasn’t filed one piece of paper yet . When I finally went to his office after he still hadn’t responded he still didn’t know exactly what had happened because he says to me Andreas! I heard you got arrested on new charges ? No Jim it’s the same case I hired you for he couldn’t and did not give me an explanation he weaseled his way out of that conversation but at this point I really didn’t care . So along the way I had still had some problems with drinking and I never lied about it I also had pneumonia and lost my voice so one court date got rescheduled. The next time we are suppose to go to court he asks to continue it because his nephew had a heart attack in a restaurant I understood we continued when it came down to it again I needed more time to try and get off my medication before I go in and do 30 days at valley st jail I wasn’t excited to go back I had my sentencing hearing he was rude again and looking for a little cash on the side since he had gone to court a little more than he wanted well after thinking about it I already over paid and got the bare minimum back never mind the fact he violated attorney client privilege multiple times. Anyway wasn’t going to let him get away with that with out at least writing a review . So Jim if your reading this it’s Andreas thanks for nothing

Very lackluster and not who you want in your corner when your freedom is on the line

reviews.text:
Extremely disappointing experience with Attorney John Durkin and his paralegal, Kelsey McCabe. The paralegal was dismissive and unhelpful, ignoring multiple requests for required financial documents. I received only a signed affidavit — without any supporting documentation — making it impossible to prepare properly for mediation.

Despite my concerns, the mediator allowed the session to go forward without enforcing New Hampshire Rule 2.16, which requires financial disclosures at least 10 days in advance. He also seemed unfamiliar with key financial issues like the 401(k), which had been flagged multiple times before the session.

As someone representing myself, I made every effort to comply with the law and communicate in good faith. Instead of being treated fairly, I felt shut out of a process that was supposed to help. This office’s failure to enforce basic standards enabled my ex’s delay tactics and post-separation financial abuse.

This was not a neutral, balanced, or professional mediation. I spent time and money trying to resolve this legally — and left with nothing. I would not recommend this mediator to anyone, especially those in high-conflict or abusive divorce cases.

Attorney Durkin is my "go-to" mediator in domestic relation matters. He has a unique ability to present information in a manner that everyone can understand. With his blunt (but kind) approach, litigants are able to see the strengths and weaknesses of their positions, which helps greatly with reaching an agreement. Attorney Durkin is always prepared and willing to go above and beyond to assist parties in reaching a resolution to move forward with their lives.

My office has utilized Attorney Durkin's mediation services multiple times in both simple and complex divorce and parenting cases.  Attorney Durkin is always prepared, respectful, and efficient. John has a very unique ability to get through to people and make them concentrate on making important business decisions in their lives rather than emotional ones, but also being able to make them feel as though they have been heard. All around, I truly believe that Attorney Durkin is one of the best mediators in all of New Hampshire and cannot recommend him enough.

I found Attorney Durkin by chance. I went along to support my daughter in her quest to seek Counsel for an unfortunate Divorce.
Unbeknownst to me, I would be in the same situation in a few short months.
I office was unassuming not like the usual highfaluting offices with crystal chandeliers and law libraries. I did not see any lawyers wearing fine Italian suits and shoes. What I did see, was a friendly Administrative Assistant busy at work looking unusually happy where she was. I met Attorney DURKIN for the second time.
He did not have a flashy desk , but we sat in a conference room.
He listened to my dilemma ask questions and advised me on several scenarios and outcomes. His calming demeanor and friendly smile again made me feel confident that I had found the right office and legal professional to assist me across this legal maze,  I knew little about.  He was genuinely concerned with his clients best interests and  least costly remedy not with how big his wallet will get .
Attorney DURKIN is a diamond. in the rough. - polished, experienced and unpretentious that would pack a wallop of a legal punch to the opposing parties. He does it with skill, integrity and talent.
I highly recommend Attorney DURKIN for your family law issues and needs. Nothing like having a great legal warrior at your side
,  Kathy, his able Assistant, appeared to me in our conversations, a valued asset of the firm. She also, provided great assistance to me. Very professional and dedicated to her work. I hope she get paid well, certainly would be worth every penny and more.
I am not a paid reviewer, just someone who likes to share my experiences so others can see value in their next interaction.

John is a seasoned and knowledgeable mediator.  We use John as a mediator on a regular basis.  Our clients are always impressed with his demeanor and practical approach to problem solving.  He is a very effective mediator and litigator.

Attorney John Durkin helped me through my divorce.  He is highly knowledgeable and straight forward.  He  responded promptly to my questions and concerns and I was able to settle through mediation and avoid a court trial.  I would definitely recommend Attorney Durkin.
reviews.ownerResponse: Thank you, Melissa! It was a pleasure working with you throughout the process.  John

reviews.text: As I was going through my divorce case John and Kathy were amazing. John was very professional and quick to respond to any of my needs going through the entire process. He took into consideration what would be best for my children and I always listened to what I had to say before giving me his advice. Kathy was great at getting everything to me in a timely manner and always polite  thank you for everything    Christine

John is a highly respected Attorney and Mediator in New Hampshire.  He has decades of experience, and it shows in how he effectively handles his cases, cares for his client's needs, and is able to appropriately resolve issues in a cooperative fashion.  There are so many area Attorneys whose first choice for a Mediator is always John Durkin, this includes myself.  As a Family Law litigator, John is  always willing to fight for his clients interests, but he does it in such a professional manner that the Judges actually listen to what he has to say.  I highly recommend John, as both an Attorney, and as a Mediator.

Attorney Durkin, in his role as mediator, has been instrumental in the settlement of many difficult and highly contested cases.   His approach is direct which allows parties to understand what they stand to lose or gain by entering into a stipulated agreement.   Even if a case does not settle at mediation, more often than not, it will settle at a later date due in part to the guidance that John provided during mediation.
reviews.ownerResponse: Thanks for the kind words Shaunna. John

So I used him in a auto accident case he got me a decent amount and didn’t ask for anything down except a piece of the pie, which I thought was fair.. now I have a civil/criminal case with a car being held by a tow tow yard bcuz state police asked them to without a warrant so I go to him to try to see what he could do and he doesn’t have a backbone says there’s nothing that he thinks he can do question aren’t you an attorney don’t you know the laws Seems like he only takes on the easy cases because he can’t go up against a big fish maybe he’s not about doing the right thing at all its only about the fast money so if you use him for an accident claim you going to get something but any attorney can get you that if you want him for a criminal case I wouldn’t bet on anything you have a better chance of donating your money to the lottery

Andy truly is the best! I hired Andy as my divorce attorney, after trying to handle things on my own. With him in my corner, much of my stress was alleviated. Any questions or concerns I had were taken care. He explained everything simply. He won’t ever leave you without answers, calling on a Friday night to make sure he gets to you before the weekend, even after spending all day in court. We got an even better outcome than I could’ve imagined. Andy and his entire staff are so kind. You won’t regret hiring him!

After being injured in a car accident that wasn’t my fault, I was overwhelmed and unsure of what to do next. From our first conversation, Andy made me feel heard, supported, and protected. He handled everything with professionalism and compassion, always keeping me informed and checking in on my well-being—not just the case. He fought hard on my behalf and made a very stressful situation much easier to get through. Thanks to his dedication and experience, I was able to focus on healing while they took care of the legal side. I’m truly grateful for his help and would strongly recommend him to anyone!

I had the opportunity and pleasure of working with Attorney Andrew Wilson with a personal criminal case. He was prompt, professional and most importantly to me, personable. When my world seemed like it was imploding, he took the time to listen to my situation and got to work immediately! He was able to achieve the absolute best outcome for me. I have already recommended his services to other people in need and I cannot praise him enough. If you need an attorney in NH… Andy’s the guy! Not only is he worth every cent, his paralegal Susan is absolutely amazing! You will feel like you’re having a conversation with not only a knowledgeable team, but also a good friend or family member.

Andy Wilson is the real deal! Unfortunately in my life I had to deal with a very tumultuous situation regarding custody of my son and I should of invested in retaining Andy Wilson & his Rockstar paralegal Susan are a dynamic legal team duo! Not only did Andy get me results I was seeking he was able to expose all the lies and gaslighting and let the facts be clearly and accurately represented to the court! He never over promised he always under promised and over delivered which made the investment in Andy & Susan worth every penny! Every hearing he was prepared and gave it his all for my son and I to get the court to do what's best for my son. I was an estranged father hadn't seen my son in almost 3 years despite having an existing parenting plan , Andy represented my case to the court efficiency, effectively in which the other party was found on 9 counts of contempt and I now have custody of my son and we have not been happier in our lives!

If you have any legal case and can afford Andy Wilson rest assured he is worth every penny just never lie, always pay and he does all the hard work to get your case represented correctly and get the justice we deserve in accordance to the Law!!

Even if his docket is full and he can't take on new cases at the moment at the very least he will always point you in the right direction and give you the best legal advice he can if he knows !

I was referred by another attorney that I use because he didn’t practice  family law. It was one of the best decisions I’ve ever made in my life. Andrew and his team really do care and they really do go all out for you. I’m a male in New Hampshire that has had his daughter for four years uninterrupted. I literally trust Andrew with my life.
Thank You

reviews.text: What I am writing are 100% verifiable facts. David and his team at National Legal saved me from bankruptcy, saved my security clearance, and got me to a point where I'm able to have credit again. I was almost $200,000.00 in debt. I had 14 credit cards and 2 loans. When I finally reached the point where I knew I was too far behind to recover on my own, I reached out to David and his team. I was, of course, full of skepticism and trepidation. David spent over 4 hours on the phone with me explaining everything and answering the litany of questions I had. Once I committed, I stayed the course and am now fully debt free! It took me 5 years and 7 months, and it was not easy by any stretch. The great thing about this program is that the account where you deposit funds is your account, and you can manage it as you see fit. Also, during those times when money is tight, you can notify the banking department and skip payments when needed. I have now been with this firm for almost 6 years, and the level of support and communication I receive now is just as good as when I started. Bad things and bad situations happen to good people, and David and his team understand that. If you need a legitimate, trustworthy team to help you get out of debt and you're willing to put in the work, there is literally no one better than National Legal. I do not work for National Legal and I was not paid for this review.

reviews.text:
I felt like was at the end of my rope, with the law firm Stanzel and Niederman breathing down my neck, trying to get me to submit to their will, threatening to take every dollar I had saved for my family, for their millionaire, and billionaire, corporate friends.  Five year old debt that had become excessively hard for myself to pay after the COVID-19 pandemic, with unforgivable million, and billion dollar corporations, that simply DID NOT care about anything other than getting their money, had simply become unmanageable. With nothing to lose, I contacted William M. Gillem (who will tell you straight up to just call him Bill).  After briefly speaking with Bill's paralegal Gail, who listened to my concerns with great empathy, I was transferred over to Bill, who not only treated me like a human being, but upon hearing my concerns from me personally, reassured me that I was not the only American who was alone regarding this, but that I also, had other options of which creditors who just "want your money", would be happier that I didn't know about.

Now to be clear, everybody has a different situation with its own complexities, so my situation may not be exactly everybody else's. One thing to note that Bill will tell you right upfront, is that there is no one size fits all solution for everybody.  Bill not only looked over my situation with a fine tooth comb, and configured the best route for me to take, but brought me along with him, educated me, and made sure that I knew exactly what was going on, and why the option that he proposed, would be the best option for me, based on my situation.  Bill has an extensive knowledge of the federal codes', which are ANYTHING, but simple, but he is able to break them down for the average human being in Lehman's terms so that you understand the process and what is going on, as well as the possible hurdles that one may face. One major thing that is greatly appreciated, is that Bill stays with you 100%, every step of the way, whatever the length of time may be.

My situation has ended up being MUCH more in my favor than I had originally anticipated, ever since sitting back, and letting Bill steer the ship for awhile, I have been VERY impressed with the work that Bill and his firm have done for me.  I could not recommend The Law Offices of William M. Gillem more highly, for their honorable service that they have provided!!
reviews.ownerResponse: Thanks so much Justin, It's been great working with you as well. Most of the time, the reason why my cases work out well is because of the client. You have been working closely with me, and paying attention through every step of your case. I can honestly say that a big part of the reason why your case went well, was because of you . . . thanks so much for your effort and attention to detail.  Best Regards, Bill

Her stellar representation convinced the court of the emotional trauma my son was experiencing. After four hearings and a two-day trial with many witnesses, the court ruled in our favor. She convinced the court to amend the Parenting Plan to protect my son's safety and well-being.

Attorney Klug showed compassion, confidence, fairness, and patience. She heard my cries and advocated for the best outcome possible. Her tenacious and brilliant approach ultimately allowed my son to enjoy the life he deserves. My words only show part of the abundance of the gratitude and gratitude we owe you. reviews.ownerResponse:
Matthew, it has taken me too long to respond to your review, my first one-star review. That's because I cannot argue with or deny anything you said, except to say that my failure to respond has nothing to do with payment. I never asked you for an additional post-discharge fee.
One of the first things I learned after law school is that the fastest way for a lawyer to get in trouble is to make a client feel neglected. If I had simply returned your call to let you know I did not have time to handle that post-discharge matter and referred you to an attorney who specialized in that type of work, we would have parted without hard feelings.
But I did not return your calls, and that was my mistake. I earned your one-star review. And I apologize.

reviews.text:
Hello! My name is Russell, and I worked with Attorney Osterman for approximately a year before I had to go on a leave of absence due to starting university. Therefore, this review is a bit different as it comes from my experience working with him rather than as a client.

I’ve always believed Attorney Osterman to be one of the most kind-hearted, inspiring, intelligent people on this planet. From my perspective, I’ve always appreciated how Attorney Osterman allowed me to explore what bankruptcy law is and the nuances of how the field of law operates. I’d bombard him with constant questions, from bankruptcy to cuisine, which he’d always take the time to answer thoroughly and with purpose. I’ve studied business ethics for a while at the University of Toronto - and Attorney Osterman is the textbook example of what it means to be a great, ethical, successful business practitioner.

From the client's perspective, I’ve seen him treat clients the same. Attorney Osterman always thoroughly answers client’s questions in a manner that, from my experience with other lawyers, is not similar to theirs. What I admired about Attorney Osterman was translating complex terms and definitions into layman's terms. A considerable stereotype around lawyers is that they use pretentious wording that often overwhelms their clients, leading to clients not fully understanding the bankruptcy process. Attorney Osterman is the literal antithesis of this stereotype. He will make sure to explain processes and definitions so clearly to the point you feel almost like a bankruptcy attorney yourself. Attorney Osterman has your hand the entire step of the bankruptcy process and will ensure not to let go of it.

There’s also this aspect of being on the winning team that I’ve admired about Attorney Osterman. Being a client of Attorney Osterman is like being a Patriots fan from 2006-2008, where you just can’t stop winning - and this is an understatement. There are times that you might ask Attorney Osterman to stop having you win so much, but he’ll just make you win even more. In my time with Attorney Osterman, so many financial situations have been improved due to his sheer experience in the field (more than 40 years of experience), complimented by his intuition, his motivation to see his clients not just succeed but prosper, and his book knowledge on how bankruptcy operates in the State of New Hampshire. All these traits have led to a ridiculously large amount of homes, cars, and other property being saved in otherwise hopeless situations. I’ve even seen credit scores in the 400s turned to 700s or higher with Attorney Osterman’s guidance.

In short, I think Attorney Osterman is the clear choice regarding bankruptcy. His expertise and wisdom (having one is sufficient, but having both is unstoppable) truly paint the way to your future worry-free financial success.
reviews.ownerResponse:
Hello, Russell.
That is one very impressive review. Thank you. I had no idea that working for me was such a pleasure.
